role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and remained silent in Phase 2.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and vegetation structure.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific plant species (Eucalyptus, Canola) and their native ranges.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed road infrastructure (unpaved road, fencing) and absence of signage.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Used camera generation quality and cross-domain knowledge of rural infrastructure.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Australia as the location. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, providing strong visual evidence (Eucalyptus, red soil, canola) that led to a correct consensus. The tournament logic was sound, correctly prioritizing the Australian candidate over the runner-up (South Africa).

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Accurately described red soil, eucalyptus trees, and canola fields.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Correctly identified Eucalyptus and Canola features.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Correctly described the unpaved road and post-and-wire fencing.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Correctly assessed image quality and infrastructure style.
